name: South Metro Indoor Golf Club
about: South Metro Indoor Golf Club is a dedicated indoor golf training facility located in Burnsville, Minnesota, designed to provide a year-round golfing experience. The venue utilizes Trackman simulator technology across two bays, offering advanced performance analytics and access to world-famous courses, making it suitable for serious practice and play. Pricing is structured with a monthly membership option at $42 or hourly rentals at $48, catering to both regulars and one-time visitors looking for a high-quality simulation experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Trackman technology used by over 800 tour pros
State-of-the-art software with famous global courses
Top-tier turf that mimics real grass

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB status unclear

simulator_hardware.notes: 2 simulator bays powered by Trackman performance technology

faq.answer: Players must bring their own clubs as none are provided.

faq.answer: No information is provided on outside food or drink policies.

faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified, but hourly rentals are available.

faq.answer: No specific information regarding child-friendly policies or activities.
